steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Before the blank is “John Donne's” — a possessive construction needing a noun. After comes “much admired during his lifetime (1572-1631) and in the decades that followed” — a participial phrase. Finally, “had... been essentially gathering dust...” — the main clause with the primary verb.

steps.title: Apply the rule for nonrestrictive modifiers
steps.content:
The blank needs “works,” to supply the subject noun and the opening comma for the nonrestrictive participial phrase (which closes after “followed,”). Choices B, C, and D introduce unwanted verbs that disrupt the modifier structure.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
